case_title: YI MAO WANG VS. G & P CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, YI MAO AS TO DEFENDANT G & P CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, YI MAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT G & P CONSTRUCTION INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $20,750.78 PRINCIPAL, $182.75 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,263.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
